---
title: "Track: Customization"
page-layout: full
---

## When to use this track

Choose this path if you want to go beyond defaults: custom priors, covariate links, alternative threshold behavior, or manual NIMBLE pipelines for inspection/debugging.

## Path (recommended)

1. [Model umbrella](../advanced/model-umbrella.qmd)
2. [Advanced: customization and tuning](../advanced/customization-and-tuning.qmd)
3. [Theory: customization maps + extension points](../advanced/theory/06-customization-and-extensions.qmd)
4. [Developers: registry](../developers/registry.qmd)

::: {.callout-important .devnote}
## Developer notes

If you are adding new kernels/tails, treat the registry as the source of truth. Update support declarations, defaults, and compatibility before touching bundle/runner/consumer code.
:::

<!-- cmgpd-footer:start -->
## Prereqs
- Required packages and data for this page are listed in the setup chunks above.

## Outputs
- This page renders model fits, diagnostics, and summary artifacts generated by package APIs.

## Interpretation
- Canonical concept page: [Customization And Tuning](../advanced/customization-and-tuning.qmd)
- Treat this page as an application/example view and use the canonical page for core definitions.

## Next
- Continue to the linked canonical concept page, then return for implementation-specific details.
<!-- cmgpd-footer:end -->
